---
title: "Melville Portal"
---

## Melville Portal

**Dates:** (1819-1904)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

A county landowner, he lived at Laverstoke, near Whitchurch, and, like Sir William Heathcote, had evidently enlisted in the Hampshire Yeomanry. D.H. Moutray Read, <i>Highways and Byways in Hampshire</i> (1923) mentions then surviving letters to him in CMY’s ‘clear and easy writing’ but his family do not seem to have them any more. [PB]

### Letters

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, July 5th 1898](../letters/3378_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)
- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan or Alexander Macmillan Jr, June 30th 1898](../letters/3377_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan_or_Alexander_Macmillan_Jr.html)
- Letter from March 3d 1871
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
